strategy_engine.notes: Gate.io testnet demo profile. Sandboxed by default: execution_mode per strategy controls sandbox routing, so no live order is placed until Gate.io's gated sandbox write test has proven the venue. Credentials resolve from GATE_TESTNET_API_KEY / GATE_TESTNET_SECRET_KEY. Set HERMX_LIVE_TRADING=true to enable live execution.

notes: Gate.io testnet only. New venue stays DISARMED until its gated write test passes.
